---
name: New skill request
about: Propose a new skill or stack variant not yet in the library
title: "feat: add <skill-name> skill"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Skill name (kebab-case):**
<!-- e.g. performance-audit-django-postgresql or tdd-spec -->

**Type:**
<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] New core pipeline skill (stack-agnostic)
- [ ] New stack-specific variant of an existing skill

**Pipeline phase:** plan | build | ship

**Problem it solves:**
<!-- What does a developer currently do manually that this skill would handle? -->

**Inputs it would take:**
<!-- What must the user provide before running? List parameters and defaults. -->

**Outputs it would produce:**
<!-- What files or documents would it generate? -->

**Stack / technology:**
<!-- e.g. Django · PostgreSQL · Python 3.12 — or "agnostic" -->

**Example use case:**
<!-- One sentence: a real scenario where you would run this skill today. -->
